'''fazhodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mib|mib]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-zh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mib|mib]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| fazhodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæzhedeth|fæzhedeth]] || [[word:fæzhedej|fæzhedej]] || [[word:fæzhedesh|fæzhedesh]] || [[word:fæzhede|fæzhede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fazhozhodoth|fazhozhodoth]] || [[word:fazhozhodoj|fazhozhodoj]] || [[word:fazhozhodosh|fazhozhodosh]] || [[word:fazhozhodo|fazhozhodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fazhodoth|fazhodoth]] || [[word:fazhodoj|fazhodoj]] || [[word:fazhodosh|fazhodosh]] || [[word:fazhodo|fazhodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fazhofdoth|fazhofdoth]] || [[word:fazhofdoj|fazhofdoj]] || [[word:fazhofdosh|fazhofdosh]] || [[word:fazhofdof|fazhofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fazhodotho|fazhodotho]] || [[word:fazhodojo|fazhodojo]] || [[word:fazhodosho|fazhodosho]] || [[word:fazhodoko|fazhodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fazhodoth|fazhodoth]] || [[word:fazhodoj|fazhodoj]] || [[word:fazhodosh|fazhodosh]] || [[word:fazhodo|fazhodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fazhodothol|fazhodothol]] || [[word:fazhodojol|fazhodojol]] || [[word:fazhodoshol|fazhodoshol]] || [[word:fazhodokol|fazhodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fazhodothotho|fazhodothotho]] || [[word:fazhodojojo|fazhodojojo]] || [[word:fazhodoshosho|fazhodoshosho]] || [[word:fazhodoko|fazhodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fazhodothon|fazhodothon]] || [[word:fazhodojon|fazhodojon]] || [[word:fazhodoshon|fazhodoshon]] || [[word:fazhodokon|fazhodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fazhodothoro|fazhodothoro]] || [[word:fazhodojoro|fazhodojoro]] || [[word:fazhodoshoro|fazhodoshoro]] || [[word:fazhodokoro|fazhodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
